description: White House line-chart infographic on a white background titled in navy serif type 'Total Native-Born Employment Level'. A legend shows two colored series: a navy-blue line labeled 'Biden Administration' and a red line labeled 'Trump Administration (so far)'. The y-axis is labeled 'Total employment (thousands)' running from 129,000 to 134,000; the x-axis runs from Nov. 2023 to Nov. 2025. A dashed vertical line marks 'Inauguration' (early 2025). The blue line segment dips and stays roughly flat around 130,000 to 131,000; the red line segment rises to about 133,000 and above. A dark navy footer bar reads 'THE WHITE HOUSE / WASHINGTON'. The tweet text reads: 'Under President Trump, native-born Americans have accounted for ALL NET JOB GAINS. PROMISES MADE, PROMISES KEPT!'
notable_text: Total Native-Born Employment Level; Biden Administration vs Trump Administration (so far); Inauguration; THE WHITE HOUSE
